title: Issue with item card view with "text" widget
excerpt:
Hello everyone, 
We are experiencing an issue since this weekend, the issue appeared out of nowhere, no change on our end and all users in our tenant are affected. 

Create a new “long text” column
Create a new item and …

posts.author: patmanz (Patrick C)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello everyone,

We are experiencing an issue since this weekend, the issue appeared out of nowhere, no change on our end and all users in our tenant are affected.

  1. Create a new “long text” column
  2. Create a new item and add text to the long text column.
  3. Open the item, create a new “Item Card” view and add a “Text” widget.

cannot edit or display the text…

I am posting here to give visibility to the issue, we are certainly not alone experiencing this.

posts.author: Sjurd (Sjurd Skutlaberg)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m experiencing the same issue with Item Card text widget + connected boards widget.
I have contacted support and waiting for their reply.

posts.author: patmanz (Patrick C)
posts.cookedHtml:
issue is now fixed, was a backend issue at monday.com.

thanks support !

posts.author: Leigh-Ellen-Holmes (Leigh Ellen Holmes)
posts.cookedHtml: @patmanz I’m still experiencing this issue. Can you please provide an updated?

posts.author: SamBoneDryRoofing (Sam)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am having the same issue. I have checked that the column that I want to display is a long text field, I have tried switching to different browsers, and restarting my computer.

No matter what I do, when I click the “Choose column” button, nothing happens at all.

The board I am trying to build this on is a monday service board.

I hope this gets fixed soon! @patmanz
